summary: Strong implementation with solid error handling and clean testing design. Primary issue: actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to commit SHA as per security best practice (should be full 40-char SHA with version comment). Secondary: pattern validation missing—invalid glob syntax silently won't match rather than fail loudly (script line ~150). Minor: variable naming (r_prio, r_pat, r_labels) could be more explicit; whitespace-trimming logic (lines 140–143) is correct but cryptic. Workflow fixture approach is well-designed. Would ship after fixing action pinning.
